creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

If you want maybe we could have a debug session on IRC, probably sometime next week. It would speed up the testing.

Just send me an e-mail privately: hselasky@freebsd.org

My theory is that the AMD based XHCI hardware you've got doesn't function properly with the USB stack in FreeBSD :-( I'm trying to narrow down what is causing the missing isochronous completion events from happening.

--HPS
